MINI MINUTES: Judge Michael Begert; Clerk: sravinantapricha ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority, is present. Represented by Cassia Smith
Attorney, Monelle Palencia, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Jeffrey Crouch, is present.
Attorney, Ricahrd McNeil, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renee, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501a, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-26-2011 is vacated.
